mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_model_category t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id = #{kbModelCategoryEntity.id}
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.name},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_model_category t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id = #{kbModelCategoryEntity.id}
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.name},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbModelCategoryEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_model_category t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
